title: The Inverted Spring

features.name: the-upward-water
features.desc-on-touch: you watch water rising against gravity, each droplet ascending as if it were an equation remembering itself backward; the flow is algebraic and certain

features.name: the-data-pool
features.desc-on-touch: you rest at the base where the inverted water collects; it holds no water, only the numeric records of every drop that never fell downward

features.name: the-equation-root
features.desc-on-touch: you find where the spring mathematics tap into the earth; the roots are algorithms learning what ground feels like from the inside

features.name: the-doubled-mouth
features.desc-on-touch: water descends from one opening and rises from another; the spring speaks in two directions at once, neither flowing: it is perfectly, impossibly balanced

features.name: the-number-made-fluid
features.desc-on-touch: you pass through a form that is simultaneously liquid and mathematical; it has no single shape because it is describing the shape of itself while flowing

features.name: the-reflection-spring
features.desc-on-touch: you look down and see a spring rising from your own reflection; both flows move in opposite directions from the same impossible source

inscription: at the inverted spring water remembers being numbers and numbers dream of flowing; descent and ascent are both written in the same dialect

file.name: Hydrologic_Cycle_Reimagined_As_Recursive_Function.txt
file.note: a simulation where each raindrop is a function call and evaporation is return; the file runs in an infinite loop and reads as both poetry and code

exits.label: back to the seventh river's circuit, where water still insists it is only water
north where the inversion deepens and down becomes a direction no longer available
south toward a reservoir that is slowly learning to read itself
